---

title: "D01_05: Final Validation"
subtitle: "Verify D01 output contracts before handoff"
parent: "D01_dna_analysis"
chapter: "CH12"
category: "derivation-task"
number: "D01_05"
date-created: "2025-12-14"
date-modified: "2026-02-08"
author: "Claude"
type: "derivation-task"
depends_on:
  - "D01_04_customer_profile"
consumes:
  - "app_data.df_dna_by_customer"
  - "app_data.df_profile_by_customer"
  - "app_data.df_segments_by_customer"
outputs_to:
  - "validation_result"
implements:
  - script: "cbz_D01_05.R"
    path: "update_scripts/DRV/cbz/"
  - script: "amz_D01_05.R"
    path: "update_scripts/DRV/amz/"
  - script: "eby_D01_05.R"
    path: "update_scripts/DRV/eby/"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-fold: false
---

# D01_05: Final Validation {#overview}

This step validates that D01 outputs are complete and consumable by dashboard modules.

## Task Definition (NSQL)

```nsql
VALIDATE app_data.df_dna_by_customer
VALIDATE app_data.df_profile_by_customer
VALIDATE app_data.df_segments_by_customer
RETURN execution_status
```

## Minimum Checks

1. Required app tables exist.
2. Current platform has non-zero rows in `df_dna_by_customer`.
3. Required identity columns exist:
   - `platform_id`
   - `customer_id`
   - `product_line_id_filter`

## Rule

D01_05 performs validation only. It must not alter analytical definitions from D01_02.

## Next Task

After D01_05, proceed to [D01_06: Master Execution Flow](D01_06_execution.qmd).
